pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 18 creates patent_draft.txt with exact title as first line; verified against metadata claim - perfect match

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic educational task designed to teach patent document formatting using Apache OpenOffice Writer. All metadata claims are verified and accurate. The task requires formatting a fictional patent specification for a haptic feedback controller device ('Adaptive Haptic Feedback Controller') from the client NeuroSync Interfaces. The patent draft is generated within the task setup scripts with the exact title 'SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR ADAPTIVE HAPTIC FEEDBACK IN VIRTUAL ENVIRONMENTS'. The formatting requirements are clearly defined: 1.00 inch margins on all sides, 12pt Times New Roman or Arial font, double spacing (2.0), line numbering enabled, bold all-caps headings, numbered claims list (1., 2., 3.), and abstract on a separate page. The output file must be saved as NeuroSync_Patent_App.odt in ODF Text Document format. No real patent data or USPTO data is involved; this is a pure simulation task.
